---
name: Bug report
about: Something is broken or behaving unexpectedly
title: "bug: "
labels: ["bug"]
assignees: []
---

## What happened

A clear, concise description of the bug.

## What you expected

What you expected to happen instead.

## How to reproduce

Steps to reproduce, ideally minimal:

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Environment

- Component: <e.g. MAF agent, OpenClaw runtime, provisioning script>
- OS / shell: <e.g. Windows 11 + PowerShell 7, Ubuntu 22.04>
- .NET / OpenClaw version: <if applicable>
- Commit SHA: <if known>

## Logs, traces, or screenshots

Paste relevant Application Insights queries, log snippets, or screenshots. **Scrub any secrets, connection strings, or real personal data first.**

## Additional context

Anything else worth knowing — related issues, recent changes, hypotheses.
